<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%","minHeight":600}'>
    <title>Gallery Dashboard</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/lottie-web/5.12.2/lottie.min.js"></script>
    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
    // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
    // =============================================================================

    /**
     * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
     */
    interface MyopInitData {
        fonts?: Array<{
            id: string;
            family: string;
            style?: string;
            weight?: number;
            url?: string;
        }>;
        lang: {
            galleryOverviewTitle: string;
            itemsTitle: string;
            galleryExpiringTitle: string;
            activeCampaignTitle: string;
            singleCampaignTitle: string;
            downloadQuotaTitle: string;
            statusOnline: string;
            statusOffline: string;
            itemsUploadingValue: string;
            itemsArchivedSimpleStatus: string;
            itemsStoredValue: string;
            galleryQuotaUsedValue: string;
            mainClientsTitle: string;
            viewAllVisitorsButton: string;
            fullGalleryDownloadLabel: string;
            partialItemsDownloaded: string;
            noDownloadsYet: string;
            downloadNotAllowed: string;
            activeCampaignsValue: string;
            firstViewLabel: string;
            usersActivityTitle: string;
            topPhotosTitle: string;
            totalGalleryViews: string;
            itemsDownloaded: string;
            itemsShared: string;
            storeSales: string;
            collectionsCreated: string;
            byUsers: string;
            noMainClient: string;
            noMainClientsYet: string;
            clientNotViewedYet: string;
            visitedToday: string;
            visitedYesterday: string;
            visitedDaysAgo: string;
            noRevenueYet: string;
            buildShopPrompt: string;
            buildShopButton: string;
            noItemsDownloaded: string;
            noItemsShared: string;
            noCollectionsCreated: string;
            noExpiration: string;
            noActiveCampaign: string;
            archivedTooltipText: string;
            learnMore: string;
            // Missing files
            itemsMissingFiles: string;
            missingFilesDialogTitle: string;
            missingFilesDialogDescription: string;
            missingFilesDeviceHeader: string;
            missingFilesFolderHeader: string;
            missingFilesFileNameHeader: string;
            missingFilesRetryButton: string;
            missingFilesDeleteButton: string;
        };
        data: {
            pageData: {
                onlineStatus: string;
                itemCounts: {
                    uploading: number;
                    stored: number;
                    archived: number;
                    missingFiles: number;
                };
                missingFilesData?: Array<{
                    fileName: string;
                    deviceName: string;
                    folderName: string;
                }>;
                uploadingError?: boolean;
                expiryDate: string | null;
                campaigns: string[];
                downloadType: string;
                videoDownloadType: string;
                quota?: {
                    used: number;
                    total: number;
                };
                storeExists: boolean;
                kbLink: string;
            };
            clientsData: Array<{
                id: string;
                name: string;
                email: string;
                hasViewed: boolean;
                firstViewedDate: string | null;
                downloadStatus: string;
                downloads: number;
            }>;
            activityData: Array<{
                type: string;
                titleKey: string;
                hoverTitleKey: string;
                value: number | { value: number; currency: string };
                mediaCount?: number;
                users: number;
            }>;
            topPhotosData?: Array<{
                id: number;
                src: string;
                alt: string;
                width: number;
                height: number;
            }>;
        };
    }

    /**
     * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
     */
    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
        'active_campaign_click': { type: string };
        'archived_kb_click': { type: string };
        'build_shop_click': Record<string, never>;
        'download_quota_click': { type: string };
        'gallery_expiring_click': { type: string };
        'main_client_click': { clientID: string };
        'metric_click': { metric_type: string };
        'photo_click': { photo_id: string };
        'uploading_error_click': { type: string };
        'view_all_visitors_click': { metric_type: string };
        'missing_files_click': { type: string };
        'missing_files_retry_click': Record<string, never>;
        'missing_files_delete_click': Record<string, never>;
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
    // =============================================================================

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
        action: K,
        payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>
    <style>
        /* --- CSS Reset & Base Styles --- */
        *,
        ::before,
        ::after {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border-width: 0;
            border-style: solid;
            border-color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        html {
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
            -moz-tab-size: 4;
            tab-size: 4;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #E0E0E0 transparent;
            /* Myop requirement: Fill container */
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        *,
        *::before,
        *::after {
            font-family: var(--font_main);
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            line-height: inherit;
            background-color: var(--background, #ffffff);
            color: var(--foreground, #111827);
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            /* Myop requirement: Fill container, component handles scrolling */
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        hr {
            height: 0;
            color: inherit;
            border-top-width: 1px;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4,
        h5,
        h6 {
            font-size: inherit;
            font-weight: inherit;
            margin: 0;
        }

        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: inherit;
        }

        :root {
            --card-border-radius: 8px;
            --avatar-size: 48px;
            --avatar-border-radius: 4px;
            /* Dynamic font variables (set by myop_init_interface) */
            --font_main: "TT Norms Pro", sans-serif;
            --font_main_weight: 400;
            --font_main_style: normal;
            /* Font size variables */
            --font-size-name: 16px;
            --font-size-initials: 20.243px;
            --font-size-metadata: 12px;
            --line-height-name: 120%;
            --line-height-metadata: 120%;
        }

        /* --- Utilities --- */
        .min-h-screen {
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        .overflow-y-scroll {
            overflow-y: scroll;
        }

        .overflow-hidden {
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .overflow-x-auto {
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .bg-white {
            background-color: #ffffff;
        }

        .bg-black {
            background-color: #000000;
        }

        .bg-gray-100 {
            background-color: #f3f4f6;
        }

        .bg-gray-50 {
            background-color: #f9fafb;
        }

        /* Custom colors from original HTML */
        .bg-custom-gray-light {
            background-color: #FFFFFF;
            display: flex;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 24px;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #DDDDD1;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }


        .text-white {
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .text-black {
            color: #000000;
        }

        .text-gray-500 {
            color: #6b7280;
        }

        .text-gray-300 {
            color: #d1d5db;
        }

        .text-red-600 {
            color: #dc2626;
        }

        /* Missing Arbitrary Color Classes Fixed */
        .text-\[\#222\] {
            color: #222222;
        }

        .text-\[\#6B6B6B\] {
            color: #6B6B6B;
        }

        /* Flexbox */
        .flex {
            display: flex;
        }

        .flex-col {
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .flex-row {
            flex-direction: row;
        }

        .flex-wrap {
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .flex-grow {
            flex-grow: 1;
        }

        .flex-shrink-0 {
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .items-center {
            align-items: center;
        }

        .items-baseline {
            align-items: baseline;
        }

        .justify-center {
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .justify-between {
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .justify-start {
            justify-content: flex-start;
        }

        /* Grid */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
        }

        .grid-cols-1 {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .grid-cols-2 {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        /* Single column for client cards on small screens */
        @media (max-width: 550px) {
            #clients-container.grid-cols-2 {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) {
            .sm\:grid-cols-3 {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .md\:grid-cols-3 {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            }

            .md\:col-span-2 {
                grid-column: span 2 / span 2;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            .lg\:grid-cols-5 {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
            }

            .lg\:col-span-2 {
                grid-column: span 2 / span 2;
            }
        }

        .content-start {
            align-content: flex-start;
        }

        /* Spacing */
        .m-0 {
            margin: 0;
        }

        .mb-1 {
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
        }

        .mb-2 {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .mb-4 {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .mb-10 {
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }

        .mb-\[48px\] {
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }

        .ml-1 {
            margin-left: 0.25rem;
        }

        .ml-2 {
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
        }

        .p-4 {
            padding: 1rem;
        }

        .px-4 {
            padding-left: 1rem;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }

        .px-5 {
            padding-left: 1.25rem;
            padding-right: 1.25rem;
        }

        .py-2 {
            padding-top: 0.5rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .py-4 {
            padding-top: 1rem;
            padding-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .pb-4 {
            padding-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .gap-0\.5 {
            gap: 0.125rem;
        }

        .gap-2 {
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .gap-3 {
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .gap-4 {
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        .gap-x-4 {
            column-gap: 1rem;
        }

        .gap-y-2 {
            row-gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .space-y-6> :not([hidden])~ :not([hidden]) {
            --tw-space-y-reverse: 0;
            margin-top: calc(1.5rem * calc(1 - var(--tw-space-y-reverse)));
            margin-bottom: calc(1.5rem * var(--tw-space-y-reverse));
        }

        /* Sizing */
        .w-full {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .h-full {
            height: 100%;
        }

        .w-4 {
            width: 1rem;
        }

        .h-4 {
            height: 1rem;
        }

        .w-8 {
            width: 2rem;
        }

        .h-8 {
            height: 2rem;
        }

        .w-12 {
            width: 3rem;
        }

        .h-12 {
            height: 3rem;
        }

        .max-w-\[500px\] {
            max-width: 500px;
        }

        .mb-\[42px\] {
            margin-bottom: 42px;
        }

        /* Missing Arbitrary Width/Height/Min-Width Fixed */
        .w-\[1px\] {
            width: 1px;
        }

        .h-\[15px\] {
            height: 15px;
        }

        .min-w-0 {
            min-width: 0;
        }

        /* Typography */
        .text-xs {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            line-height: 1rem;
        }

        .text-sm {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.25rem;
        }

        .text-base {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.5rem;
        }

        .text-xl {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            line-height: 1.75rem;
        }

        .text-2xl {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 2rem;
        }

        .text-\[29px\] {
            font-size: 29px;
        }

        .font-normal {
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .font-medium {
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .leading-normal {
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        .leading-\[120\%\] {
            line-height: 120%;
        }

        .leading-\[125\%\] {
            line-height: 125%;
        }

        .leading-\[129\%\] {
            line-height: 129%;
        }

        .text-center {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .text-left {
            text-align: left;
        }

        .underline {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .whitespace-nowrap {
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /* Positioning & Visibility */
        .relative {
            position: relative;
        }

        .absolute {
            position: absolute;
        }

        .inset-0 {
            top: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
        }

        .z-10 {
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .block {
            display: block;
        }

        .inline-flex {
            display: inline-flex;
        }

        .hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Effects */
        /* Custom card radius class for easy modification */
        .card-radius {
            border-radius: 8px;
        }

        .avatar-radius {
            display: flex;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 12px 16px 13px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            aspect-ratio: 1/1;
            border-radius: 90px;
            background: #F2F2ED;
        }

        .text-name {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-1-primary-text, #222);
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: var(--font_main_weight);
            line-height: 125%;
            /* 20px */
        }

        /* Section titles styling */
        #clients-title,
        #activity-title,
        #top-photos-title {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-1-primary-text, #222);
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 130%;
            /* 20.8px */
        }

        /* View All link container styling */
        #view-all-visitors {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-1-primary-text, #222);
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: var(--font_main_weight);
            line-height: 125%;
            /* 20px */
            text-decoration-line: underline;
            text-decoration-style: solid;
            text-decoration-skip-ink: none;
            text-decoration-thickness: auto;
            text-underline-offset: auto;
            text-underline-position: from-font;
        }

        /* Meta text styling for client cards */
        p.text-xs.font-medium.text-\[#222222\].ml-1 {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-2-secondary-text, #6B6B6B);
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: var(--font_main_weight);
            line-height: 125%;
            /* 20px */
        }

        .shadow-sm {
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .opacity-0 {
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .opacity-20 {
            opacity: 0.2;
        }

        .opacity-25 {
            opacity: 0.25;
        }

        .opacity-75 {
            opacity: 0.75;
        }

        .cursor-pointer {
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .object-cover {
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        .object-contain {
            object-fit: contain;
        }

        .px-3 {
            padding-left: 0.75rem;
            padding-right: 0.75rem;
        }

        /* Text Truncation */
        .text-ellipsis {
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        /* Transitions & Animations */
        .transition-colors {
            transition-property: background-color, border-color, color, fill, stroke;
            transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            transition-duration: 150ms;
        }

        .transition-opacity {
            transition-property: opacity;
            transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            transition-duration: 300ms;
        }

        .transition-transform {
            transition-property: transform;
            transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            transition-duration: 300ms;
        }

        .duration-200 {
            transition-duration: 200ms;
        }

        .duration-300 {
            transition-duration: 300ms;
        }

        .group:hover .group-hover\:opacity-100 {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .group:hover .group-hover\:opacity-20 {
            opacity: 0.2;
        }

        .group:hover .group-hover\:scale-105 {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            from {
                transform: rotate(0deg);
            }

            to {
                transform: rotate(360deg);
            }
        }

        .animate-spin {
            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Custom Specific Classes */
        .truncate-text {
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 200px;
        }

        .truncate-2-lines {
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
        }

        /* Tooltip styles */
        .tooltip-container {
            position: relative;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .tooltip {
            visibility: hidden;
            opacity: 0;
            display: inline-flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 10px;
            background-color: #222;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 10px;
            position: absolute;
            z-index: 10;
            width: 280px;
            transition: opacity 0.2s;
            top: 100%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .tooltip p {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-5-1-inverted-color-text, #FFF);
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: var(--font_main_weight);
            line-height: 125%;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .tooltip a {
            color: var(--3-Text-H-3-5-1-inverted-color-text, #FFF);
            text-align: center;
            font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: var(--font_main_style);
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 125%;
            text-decoration-line: underline;
            text-decoration-style: solid;
            text-decoration-skip-ink: none;
            text-decoration-thickness: auto;
            text-underline-offset: auto;
            text-underline-position: from-font;
        }

        .tooltip-container:hover .tooltip {
            visibility: visible;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .tooltip::after {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 100%;
            left: 50%;
            margin-left: -5px;
            border-width: 5px;
            border-style: solid;
            border-color: transparent transparent #222 transparent;
        }

        /* Modal styles */
        .modal-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: opacity 0.2s, visibility 0.2s;
        }

        .modal-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        .modal-content {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
            max-height: 80vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }

        .modal-header {
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .modal-header h3 {
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin: 0 0 8px 0;
            color: #111827;
        }

        .modal-header p {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #6b7280;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .modal-body {
            padding: 16px 24px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .modal-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .modal-table th {
            text-align: left;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background-color: #f9fafb;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #374151;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .modal-table td {
            padding: 10px 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
            color: #111827;
        }

        .modal-table tr:last-child td {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .modal-footer {
            padding: 16px 24px;
            border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .modal-btn {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font_main);
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background-color 0.15s;
        }

        .modal-btn-primary {
            background-color: #000;
            color: white;
            border: none;
        }

        .modal-btn-primary:hover {
            background-color: #333;
        }

        .modal-btn-secondary {
            background-color: white;
            color: #374151;
            border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
        }

        .modal-btn-secondary:hover {
            background-color: #f9fafb;
        }

        .modal-btn-danger {
            background-color: white;
            color: #000;
            border: 1px solid #000;
        }

        .modal-btn-danger:hover {
            background-color: #f5f5f5;
        }

        .modal-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            right: 16px;
            background: none;
            border: none;

    <script>
        (function() {
        // Private scope - all implementation details

        // --- Helper Functions (Internal) ---
        function formatCurrency(value, currencyCode) {
            try {
                return new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
                    style: 'currency',
                    currency: currencyCode,
                    currencyDisplay: 'narrowSymbol',
                    minimumFractionDigits: 0,
                    maximumFractionDigits: 0
                }).format(value);
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn(`Invalid currency code: ${currencyCode}`);
                return `${currencyCode} ${value}`;
            }
        }

        function formatDate(dateString) {
            if (!dateString) return '';
            const date = new Date(dateString);
            const day = date.getDate();
            const year = date.getFullYear();
            const month = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', { month: 'short' }).format(date);

            // Get ordinal suffix (1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc.)
            const getOrdinalSuffix = (n) => {
                const s = ['th', 'st', 'nd', 'rd'];
                const v = n % 100;
                return s[(v - 20) % 10] || s[v] || s[0];
            };

            return `${month} ${day}${getOrdinalSuffix(day)}, ${year}`;
        }

        function formatVisitedDate(dateString, lang) {
            if (!dateString) return '';
            const viewDate = new Date(dateString);
            const today = new Date();
            // Reset time to compare dates only
            viewDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
            today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
            const diffTime = today - viewDate;
            const diffDays = Math.floor(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));

            if (diffDays === 0) {
                return lang.visitedToday || 'Visited today';
            } else if (diffDays === 1) {
                return lang.visitedYesterday || 'Visited yesterday';
            } else {
                const template = lang.visitedDaysAgo || 'Visited {days} days ago';
                return template.replace('{days}', diffDays);
            }
        }

        function getInitials(name) {
            if (!name) return '';
            if (name.toLowerCase() === 'anonymous') return 'A';
            const names = name.split(' ');
            let initials = names[0].substring(0, 1).toUpperCase();
            if (names.length > 1) {
                initials += names[names.length - 1].substring(0, 1).toUpperCase();
            }
            return initials;
        }

        // --- Balanced Layout Logic (Linear Partitioning) ---

        /**
         * Calculates a balanced layout with constraints:
         * - Row height between 100px and 200px
         * - Rows perfectly match container width (no white space)
         * - Images maintain aspect ratio with varying widths
         */
        function calculateJustifiedLayout(photos, containerWidth, margin) {
            if (!photos || photos.length === 0) return [];

            const MIN_ROW_HEIGHT = 150;
            const MAX_ROW_HEIGHT = 300;
            const MAX_CROP_PERCENT = 0.10; // Don't crop more than 10%

            // 1. Prepare photos with aspect ratios
            const photosWithAR = photos.map(photo => ({
                ...photo,
                aspectRatio: (photo.width && photo.height) ? photo.width / photo.height : 1.5,
            }));

            const totalAR = photosWithAR.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.aspectRatio, 0);

            // Safety check for container width
            if (!containerWidth || containerWidth <= 0) {
                console.warn("[Layout] Container width invalid, defaulting to 1200");
                containerWidth = 1200;
            }

            // 2. Determine optimal number of rows
            // We want rows between MIN and MAX height
            // For height H, we need: widthForPhotos = rowAR * H
            // So: rowAR = widthForPhotos / H
            // Min AR needed: widthForPhotos / MAX_HEIGHT
            // Max AR allowed: widthForPhotos / MIN_HEIGHT

            const minRequiredRowAR = containerWidth / MAX_ROW_HEIGHT;
            const maxAllowedRowAR = containerWidth / MIN_ROW_HEIGHT;

            // Start with max rows that keep height <= MAX_HEIGHT
            let k = Math.floor(totalAR / minRequiredRowAR);

            // 3. Find optimal partition that satisfies MIN and MAX height constraints
            let finalRows = [];

            // Use fewer rows when we have few photos to reduce cropping
            // Only enforce 2+ rows when we have 5+ photos
            const minRows = photos.length >= 5 ? 2 : 1;

            // Safety constraints - ensure k is at least minRows
            if (k > photos.length) k = photos.length;
            if (k < minRows) k = minRows;

            while (k >= minRows) {
                const partition = linearPartition(photosWithAR, k);

                // Validate partition - check both MIN and MAX height constraints
                const isValid = partition.every(row => {
                    if (row.length === 0) return false;
                    const rowAR = row.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.aspectRatio, 0);
                    const gapTotal = (row.length - 1) * margin;
                    const widthForPhotos = containerWidth - gapTotal;
                    const height = widthForPhotos / rowAR;

                    // Must be between MIN and MAX (with small float tolerance)
                    return height >= MIN_ROW_HEIGHT - 1 && height <= MAX_ROW_HEIGHT + 1;
                });

                if (isValid || k === minRows) {
                    finalRows = partition;
                    break;
                }

                // Try fewer rows (more photos per row = shorter rows)
                k--;
            }

            // 4. Calculate Final Display Dimensions
            // Check if justified layout would crop more than 10%, if so use natural ratios
            return finalRows.map(row => {
                const rowTotalAR = row.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.aspectRatio, 0);
                const gapTotal = (row.length - 1) * margin;
                const widthForPhotos = containerWidth - gapTotal;

                // Calculate height needed to fill row width perfectly
                let height = widthForPhotos / rowTotalAR;

                // Clamp to constraints
                if (height < MIN_ROW_HEIGHT) height = MIN_ROW_HEIGHT;
                if (height > MAX_ROW_HEIGHT) height = MAX_ROW_HEIGHT;

                // Check if any photo would be cropped more than 10%
                let exceedsCropLimit = false;
                for (const photo of row) {
                    const naturalHeight = photo.height;
                    const cropRatio = Math.abs(height - naturalHeight) / naturalHeight;

                    // Also check width crop
                    const displayWidth = photo.aspectRatio * height;
                    const naturalWidth = photo.width;
                    const widthCropRatio = Math.abs(displayWidth - naturalWidth) / naturalWidth;

                    if (cropRatio > MAX_CROP_PERCENT || widthCropRatio > MAX_CROP_PERCENT) {
                        exceedsCropLimit = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                // If cropping exceeds limit, use natural aspect ratios without filling row
                if (exceedsCropLimit) {
                    // Calculate what the total width would be at the target height
                    const targetHeight = Math.min(MAX_ROW_HEIGHT, Math.max(MIN_ROW_HEIGHT, height));
                    const totalWidthAtTargetHeight = row.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.aspectRatio * targetHeight), 0);
                    const totalWidthWithGaps = totalWidthAtTargetHeight + gapTotal;

                    // If that exceeds container width, scale down proportionally
                    let finalHeight = targetHeight;
                    if (totalWidthWithGaps > containerWidth) {
                        // Scale down to fit container
                        finalHeight = widthForPhotos / rowTotalAR;
                        // Still respect minimum height
                        finalHeight = Math.max(MIN_ROW_HEIGHT, finalHeight);
                    }

                    return row.map(photo => ({
                        ...photo,
                        displayHeight: finalHeight,
                        displayWidth: photo.aspectRatio * finalHeight,
                        skipJustify: true // Flag to indicate this row shouldn't fill width
                    }));
                }

                // Otherwise, use justified layout (fill row width)
                return row.map(photo => ({
                    ...photo,
                    displayHeight: height,
                    displayWidth: photo.aspectRatio * height,
                    skipJustify: false
                }));
            });
        }

        /**
         * Linear Partition Algorithm
         * Partitions a sequence of positive numbers (here aspect ratios) into k ranges
         * such that the maximum sum over all ranges is minimized.
         * Adapted for Aspect Ratios: We want to balance the rows.
         * Minimizing the maximum sum of ARs is roughly equivalent to balancing row widths.
         *
         * However, standard linear partition minimizes the *maximum sum*.
         * Here, we want to ensure *minimum sum* ( >= MinRequiredRowAR).
         * Standard partition balances them, so it's the best approach to get "even" rows.
         */
        function linearPartition(seq, k) {
            if (k <= 0) return [];
            if (k >= seq.length) return seq.map(x => [x]);
            if (k === 1) return [seq];

            const n = seq.length;
            // partitionTable[i][j] = min cost to partition first j elements into i sets
            const table = Array(k).fill(0).map(() => Array(n).fill(0));
            const solution = Array(k - 1).fill(0).map(() => Array(n - 1).fill(0));

            // Prefix sums of aspect ratios
            const weights = seq.map(p => p.aspectRatio);

            for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                table[0][i] = (i === 0) ? weights[0] : table[0][i - 1] + weights[i];
            }

            for (let i = 1; i < k; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
                    let currentMin = Infinity;

                    // Try splitting at x (0 to j-1)
                    // Last range is from x+1 to j
                    for (let x = 0; x < j; x++) {
                        const costLastRange = sum(weights, x + 1, j);
                        const costPreviousRanges = table[i - 1][x];
                        const maxCost = Math.max(costPreviousRanges, costLastRange);

                        if (maxCost < currentMin) {
                            currentMin = maxCost;
                            solution[i - 1][j - 1] = x;
                        }
                    }
                    table[i][j] = currentMin;
                }
            }

            // Reconstruct solution
            let result = [];
            let nIdx = n - 1;

            for (let i = k - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
                let splitIdx = solution[i][nIdx - 1];
                // Handle case where split might be undefined if k is large relative to n?
                // Should be covered by k >= seq.length check at start.
                // Fallback for strict typing or edge cases:
                if (splitIdx === undefined) splitIdx = -1;

                const row = seq.slice(splitIdx + 1, nIdx + 1);
                result.unshift(row);
                nIdx = splitIdx;
            }
            result.unshift(seq.slice(0, nIdx + 1));

            return result;
        }

        function sum(arr, start, end) {
            let s = 0;
            for (let i = start; i <= end; i++) {
                s += arr[i];
            }
            return s;
        }

        // --- Load Image Dimensions ---
        function loadImageDimensions(photos) {
            return Promise.all(photos.map(photo => {
                return new Promise((resolve) => {
                    // If dimensions are already provided, use them
                    if (photo.width && photo.height) {
                        resolve({
                            ...photo,
                            width: photo.width,
                            height: photo.height
                        });
                        return;
                    }

                    // Otherwise, load the image to get its natural dimensions
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.onload = () => {
                        resolve({
                            ...photo,
                            width: img.naturalWidth,
                            height: img.naturalHeight
                        });
                    };
                    img.onerror = () => {
                        // Fallback to default aspect ratio if image fails to load
                        resolve({
                            ...photo,
                            width: 800,
                            height: 600
                        });
                    };

        // --- Render Function with Perfect Row Justification ---
        function renderPhotoGrid(photos) {
            const container = document.getElementById('top-photos-container');
            if (!container) return;

            if (!photos || photos.length === 0) {
                document.getElementById('top-photos-section').style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById('top-photos-section').style.display = 'block';

            container.className = 'w-full';

            // Show loading state
            container.innerHTML = '<div class="w-full text-center text-gray-500 py-8">Loading photos...</div>';

            // Load image dimensions, then calculate layout
            loadImageDimensions(photos).then(photosWithDimensions => {
                // Use double requestAnimationFrame to ensure layout is fully calculated
                // First RAF: browser applies pending style changes
                // Second RAF: browser has computed layout dimensions
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        let containerWidth = container.clientWidth;

                        // If container width is still 0, use parent's width or fallback
                        if (!containerWidth || containerWidth <= 0) {
                            const parent = container.parentElement;
                            containerWidth = parent ? parent.clientWidth : 0;
                        }

                        // Final fallback: use a reasonable default
                        if (!containerWidth || containerWidth <= 0) {
                            containerWidth = window.innerWidth - 40; // Account for padding
                        }

                        const gap = 8; // 8px gap between images

                        const rows = calculateJustifiedLayout(photosWithDimensions, containerWidth, gap);

                        let html = '<div class="flex flex-col gap-2">';

                        rows.forEach((row) => {
                            const skipJustify = row.length > 0 && row[0].skipJustify;
                            // Calculate total width of photos + gaps for skipJustify rows
                            let rowWidthStyle = '';
                            if (skipJustify) {
                                const totalPhotosWidth = row.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.displayWidth, 0);
                                const gaps = (row.length - 1) * 8; // 8px gaps
                                const totalWidth = totalPhotosWidth + gaps;
                                rowWidthStyle = `style="width: ${totalWidth}px;"`;
                            }

                            html += `<div class="flex flex-row flex-nowrap gap-2 ${skipJustify ? '' : 'w-full'}" ${rowWidthStyle}>`;

                            row.forEach((photo, index) => {
                                const displayWidth = photo.displayWidth;
                                const displayHeight = photo.displayHeight;
                                const isLastInRow = index === row.length - 1;

                                // All photos get fixed width to prevent flexbox collapsing
                                const flexStyle = `width: ${displayWidth}px; flex-shrink: 0;`;

                                html += `
                                    <div class="relative group cursor-pointer overflow-hidden"
                                         style="${flexStyle} height: ${displayHeight}px;"
                                         onclick="myop_cta_handler('photo_click', { photo_id: '${photo.id}' })">
                                        <img src="${photo.src}" alt="${photo.alt || ''}" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105">
                                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-20 transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
                                    </div>
                                `;
                            });
                            html += `</div>`;
                        });
                        html += '</div>';

                        container.innerHTML = html;
                    });
                });
            });
        }

        function renderActivity(data, lang) {
            const activityContainer = document.getElementById('activity-container');
            if (activityContainer) {
                const storeExists = data.pageData.storeExists;
                const activityItems = data.activityData.map((activity, index) => {
                    const isSalesMetric = activity.type === 'sales';
                    const isLastItem = index === data.activityData.length - 1;

                    let val = activity.value;
                    if ((activity.type === 'downloads' || activity.type === 'shares') && typeof activity.value === 'object' && activity.value !== null && activity.value.mediaCount !== undefined) {
                        val = activity.value.mediaCount;
                    } else if (activity.mediaCount !== undefined) {
                        val = activity.mediaCount;
                    }

                    const salesValue = isSalesMetric ? activity.value.value : null;
                    const salesCurrency = isSalesMetric ? activity.value.currency : null;
                    const isEmpty = isSalesMetric ? (salesValue === 0 || salesValue === null) : val === 0;
                    const displayValue = isSalesMetric
                        ? (salesValue === null || salesCurrency === null ? '0' : formatCurrency(salesValue, salesCurrency))
                        : val;

                    let onclickAttr = '';
                    if (!isEmpty && activity.type !== 'views') {
                        onclickAttr = `onclick="myop_cta_handler('metric_click', { metric_type: '${activity.type}' })"`;
                    }

                    const separatorDiv = isLastItem ? '' : `
                        <div style="width: 1px; background-color: #E9E9E3; align-self: stretch; margin: 12px 0;"></div>
                    `;

                    const hoverClass = (!isEmpty && activity.type !== 'views') ? 'insight-item' : '';
                    const cursorStyle = (!isEmpty && activity.type !== 'views') ? 'cursor: pointer;' : '';

                    // Special rendering for sales metric when store doesn't exist
                    if (isSalesMetric && !storeExists) {
                        const buildShopArrowIcon = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" style="flex-shrink: 0;">
                            <g clip-path="url(#clip0_372_18207)">
                                <path d="M14.6673 8.0026C14.6673 4.3207 11.6825 1.33594 8.00065 1.33594C4.31875 1.33594 1.33398 4.3207 1.33398 8.0026C1.33398 11.6845 4.31875 14.6693 8.00065 14.6693C11.6825 14.6693 14.6673 11.6845 14.6673 8.0026Z" stroke="#222222" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                <path d="M4.66797 8H11.3346H10.873" stroke="#222222" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                <path d="M8.50586 10.8287L11.3343 8.00028L8.50586 5.17188" stroke="#222222" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                            </g>
                            <defs>
                                <clipPath id="clip0_372_18207">
                                    <rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/>
                                </clipPath>
                            </defs>
                        </svg>`;

                        return `
                            <div class="flex flex-col justify-center items-start" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; padding-left: 24px; padding-right: 24px;">
                                <div style="color: var(--Text-Primary, #222); font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 28px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 128%; margin-bottom: 2px;">${displayValue}</div>
                                <div style="color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-2-secondary-text, #6B6B6B); font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 12px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 133%; margin-bottom: 4px;">${lang.buildShopPrompt}</div>
                                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; cursor: pointer;" onclick="myop_cta_handler('build_shop_click', {})">
                                    <span style="color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-1-primary-text, #222); text-align: center; font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 16px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 125%; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: solid; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; text-decoration-thickness: auto; text-underline-offset: auto; text-underline-position: from-font;">${lang.buildShopButton}</span>
                                    ${buildShopArrowIcon}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            ${separatorDiv}
                        `;
                    }

                    return `
                        <div class="flex flex-col justify-center items-start ${hoverClass}" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; padding-left: 24px; padding-right: 24px; ${cursorStyle}" ${onclickAttr}>
                            <div style="color: var(--Text-Primary, #222); font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 28px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 128%; margin-bottom: 2px;">${displayValue}</div>
                            <div style="color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-1-primary-text, #222); font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 16px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 125%; margin-bottom: 12px;">${lang[activity.titleKey]}</div>
                            <div style="color: var(--3-Text-H-3-1-2-secondary-text, #6B6B6B); font-feature-settings: 'liga' off, 'clig' off; font-family: var(--font_main); font-size: 12px; font-style: var(--font_main_style); font-weight: var(--font_main_weight); line-height: 133%;">${lang.byUsers.replace('{userCount}', activity.users)}</div>
                        </div>
                        ${separatorDiv}
                    `;
                });

                activityContainer.innerHTML = activityItems.join('');
            }
        }

        // --- 1. Global CTA Handler ---
        window.myop_cta_handler = function (action_id, payload) {
            // Logs the action instead of alerting or updating UI directly
            console.log(`[CTA Handler] Action: ${action_id}`, payload);
        };

        // --- Missing Files Modal Functions ---
        window.openMissingFilesModal = function() {
            const state = window.myop_init_interface();
            if (!state) return;

            const { lang, data } = state;
            const missingFilesData = data.pageData.missingFilesData || [];

            // Set modal content from lang
            document.getElementById('missing-files-modal-title').textContent = lang.missingFilesDialogTitle;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-modal-description').textContent = lang.missingFilesDialogDescription;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-header-file').textContent = lang.missingFilesFileNameHeader;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-header-device').textContent = lang.missingFilesDeviceHeader;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-header-folder').textContent = lang.missingFilesFolderHeader;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-retry-btn').textContent = lang.missingFilesRetryButton;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-delete-btn').textContent = lang.missingFilesDeleteButton;

            // Populate table
            const tableBody = document.getElementById('missing-files-table-body');
            tableBody.innerHTML = missingFilesData.map(file => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${file.fileName}</td>
                    <td>${file.deviceName}</td>
                    <td>${file.folderName}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');

            // Show modal
            document.getElementById('missing-files-modal').classList.add('active');

            // Fire CTA
            window.myop_cta_handler('missing_files_click', { type: 'missing_files_click' });
        };

        window.closeMissingFilesModal = function(event) {
            if (event && event.target !== event.currentTarget) return;
            document.getElementById('missing-files-modal').classList.remove('active');
        };

        // --- State Management ---
        let currentState = null;
        let currentPhotos = null;
        let resizeListenerAttached = false;
        let loadedFontUrls = new Set();

        // Resize handler function (reusable reference)
        function handleResize() {
            if (currentPhotos && currentPhotos.length > 0) {
                renderPhotoGrid(currentPhotos);
            }
        }

        // --- 2. Global Initialization Interface ---
        window.myop_init_interface = function (config) {
            // Getter mode - return current state
            if (!config) return currentState;

            // Store current state
            currentState = config;

            // Hide empty state and show main content
            const emptyState = document.getElementById('empty-state');
            const mainContent = document.getElementById('main-content');
            if (emptyState) emptyState.style.display = 'none';
            if (mainContent) mainContent.style.display = 'block';

            // 2a. Load Fonts if provided (only load new fonts)
            if (config.fonts && Array.isArray(config.fonts)) {
                const root = document.documentElement;
                config.fonts.forEach(font => {
                    // Load font stylesheet if URL provided
                    if (font.url && !loadedFontUrls.has(font.url)) {
                        const link = document.createElement('link');
                        link.href = font.url;
                        link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                        document.head.appendChild(link);
                        loadedFontUrls.add(font.url);
                    }
                    // Set CSS variables for this font based on its id
                    if (font.id && font.family) {
                        root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}`, `"${font.family}", sans-serif`);
                        if (font.weight !== undefined) {
                            root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}_weight`, font.weight);
                        }
                        if (font.style) {
                            root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}_style`, font.style);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            const { lang, data } = config;

            // 2b. Populate DOM (updates will replace existing content)
            document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = lang.galleryOverviewTitle;

            renderBadges(data, lang);

            document.getElementById('activity-title').textContent = lang.usersActivityTitle;

            renderClients(data, lang);
            renderActivity(data, lang);

            const topPhotosSection = document.getElementById('top-photos-section');
            const topPhotosData = data.topPhotosData;

            if (topPhotosData && topPhotosData.length > 0) {
                document.getElementById('top-photos-title').textContent = lang.topPhotosTitle;

                // Store photos as-is (loadImageDimensions will handle missing dimensions)
                currentPhotos = topPhotosData;

                // Render the photo grid (will load dimensions asynchronously)
                renderPhotoGrid(currentPhotos);

                // Attach resize listener only once
                if (!resizeListenerAttached) {
                    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
                    resizeListenerAttached = true;
                }

            } else {
                // No photos - hide section and clear stored photos
                topPhotosSection.style.display = 'none';
                currentPhotos = null;
            }
        };

    })(); // End of IIFE
    </script>
